class.name: SkaldAction
class.brief_description: A fire-and-forget method call from Skald.
class.description: Represents a script-initiated method call that does [b]not[/b] expect a return value (a [code]post[/code]). Handle the call for its side effects, then advance with [method SkaldEngine.act] or [method SkaldEngine.advance]. Do not call [method SkaldEngine.answer] for an action — doing so returns a [code]RESOLUTION_QUEUE_EMPTY[/code] error. A method call that expects a return value arrives as a [SkaldQuery] instead. .method: string .args: Array .get_arg_count() -> int .get_arg(index) -> Variant

members.member: The arguments passed to the method.
